# [Product] Upgrade Teams and Team Detail intelligence pages

Labels: `area: product-experience`, `type: feature`, `priority: medium`, `status: ready`
Milestone: `v0.3 Trends + Team Intelligence`

## Objective

Turn Teams and Team Detail into analytical team intelligence surfaces.

## Context

Teams should read as a team intelligence board and Team Detail should read as a
team dossier, not archive-style records.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Teams page supports comparison and scanning across clubs.
- [ ] Team Detail summarizes identity, performance, form, discipline, and caveats where data allows.
- [ ] Pages use existing FastAPI JSON paths rather than frontend-only durable logic.
- [ ] Frontend build passes.
